candidate_metrics.status_reason: chordia gate: missing strict replay audit verdict

methodology.approval_rule: APPROVE_SHADOW_ONLY requires live allocator metrics proving candidate beats incumbent
methodology.correlation_rule: reuse canonical pairwise lane correlation; fail closed on measurement errors
methodology.ranking_rule: rank only PASS_CHORDIA rows with canonical allocator c8_oos_status=PASSED
methodology.unique_day_rule: n_unique_days comes from validated_setups.trade_day_count, not MD N_fired
